description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service and a before_script that logs in to the Docker registry with $DOCKER_USERNAME and $DOCKER_PASSWORD. Define two stages, build and tag, and set variables for CONTAINER_REPO and the various CONTAINER_TAG values. In the build stage add jobs job_build_10_alpine, job_build_10_default, job_build_6_alpine, job_build_6_default, job_build_8_alpine, and job_build_8_default, each limited to the master branch, that run: apk add --no-cache m4, m4 $CONTAINER_TAG/Dockerfile.m4 > $CONTAINER_TAG/Dockerfile, docker build -t $CONTAINER_REPO:$CONTAINER_TAG $CONTAINER_TAG, and docker push $CONTAINER_REPO:$CONTAINER_TAG. In the tag stage add a job_build_latest job, also limited to master, that runs: docker pull $CONTAINER_REPO:$CONTAINER_TAG_SOURCE, docker tag $CONTAINER_REPO:$CONTAINER_TAG_SOURCE $CONTAINER_REPO:$CONTAINER_TAG_TARGET, and docker push $CONTAINER_REPO:$CONTAINER_TAG_TARGET, using variables CONTAINER_TAG_SOURCE=$CONTAINER_TAG_10_DEFAULT and CONTAINER_TAG_TARGET=$CONTAINER_TAG_LATEST. The pipeline pushes all built images to the specified Docker repository.
